humidity_sensor.title: Humidity Sensor
humidity_sensor.description: Expose humidity sensor from device(s) to HomeKit

night_light.title: Night Light Slider
night_light.description: Enable brightness slider / switch for the Night Light

auto_pro.title: Auto Pro Mode Switch
auto_pro.description: Enables switch to turn on / off Auto Pro Mode on LEH_S601S / LUH_O601S models

enableDebugMode.title: Enable Debug Mode
enableDebugMode.description: Enable debug mode for the plugin

showOffWhenDisconnected.title: Show Off When Disconnected
showOffWhenDisconnected.description: When set to true, HomeKit will display unresponsive humidifiers as Off instead of Not Responding. Read the "Note to Seasonal Humidifier Users" in the README for more info.

pollingInterval.title: Polling Interval (seconds)
pollingInterval.description: How often (in seconds) to poll VeSync for device status updates. Increase this if you're sharing your VeSync API quota with another integration (e.g. Hubitat) and hitting daily request limits. Minimum 10 seconds.
